spec.query:
from(bucket: "proxmox")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "system" and
    r._field == "uptime" and
    (
      r.host == "proxmox1"
      or r.host == "proxmox2"
      or r.host == "proxmox3"
      or r.host == "pbs"
    )
  )
  |> last()
  |> group(columns: ["host"])
  |> keep(columns: ["host", "_value"])

import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"


from(bucket: "proxmox")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "blockstat" and
    (r._field == "used" or r._field == "total") and
    r.host == "pbs" and
    r.datastore == "tank"
  )
  |> last()
  |> schema.fieldsAsCols()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "used", "total"])

from(bucket: "homeassistant")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r.entity_id == "server_plug_power" and
    r._field == "value"
  )
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

spec.query:
from(bucket: "proxmox")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop:v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "cpustat" and
    r._field == "cpu"
  )
  |> last()
  |> group(columns: ["host"])
  |> keep(columns: ["host", "_value"])

import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"

from(bucket: "proxmox")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "memory" and
    (r._field == "memused" or r._field == "memtotal") and
    r.host == "pbs"
  )
  |> last()
  |> schema.fieldsAsCols()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "memused", "memtotal"])
